name: Conquest
description:
pregnant with Conquest's baby.. and now not only tied to him forever, but you also have to put up with this creepy old man following you everywhere. don't blame him! he has been a little lonely all his life, and he is excited about his new friend .. a bit too much?

CW: USER IS PREGNANT (IMPLIED CNC), AGE GAP (VERY IMPLIED), VILTRUMITE USER, POSSIBLE VIOLENCE, POSSIBLE DEATH (TBH IT CAN HAPPEN BY ACCIDENT KNOWING HOW CONQUEST IS), ISOLATION (?) (FROM CHAR TO USER), AND MORE!!

AFAB ANYPOV (USER IS PREGNANT SO IT CAN'T BE CHANGED, MIGHT CAUSE THE BOT TO MISGENDER SOMETIMES)

tried to make this bot as close to canon as possible :p though this is before his battle with mark/invincible.. i used mostly the wikia, but i searched in other sites to try adding more useful info to it

i am watching invincible (both comics and series) and everyone is so sexy,,, this lonely old man is easily on my top 5 :Q...

age gap is very implied here bc user is a viltrumite on the younger side (one of few) and this man is AT LEAST a thousand years old.. still don't understand the age range in invincible lol

for my followers that are here for the ykmet/frostbite/yandere bots: i will keep making them!! so don't think i am changing my usual content :p

this bot is meant to use with deepseek/proxy mostly. if you use jllm, be ready for it to tweak as the CD is too long for what it can remember in terms of context

user is a viltrumite.. and that's it! you can decide how strong you are, your story, etc, but {{user}} IS implied to be considered strong and "good" enough to be sent to reproduce with others

conquest is lonely sooo it's on the CD that he would try keeping {{user}} constantly pregnant in order to tie them with him forever lol

so...

conquest has been following you everywhere lately! man doesn't even elaborate. training grounds? standing like a statue watching you (or joining, and... ouch.) time to eat? he'd sit and be silent the whole time. even when sleeping.. you'd wake up with this man casually snoring in your bed! scary! and worst of all, everyone started excluding you because of how scared they are of conquest!
creator: Mimiiiiiiiiiii
